rationale: Ukrainian strikes on Crimea causing panic there is a continuation of established Black Sea tension; no direct threat to Romania confirmed, and oil price decline continues as background. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: 'Island surrounded by war': Crimeans panic amid Ukrainian attacks
top_events.summary: Increased Ukrainian strikes on Crimea raise Black Sea tension slightly, but no direct threat to Romania has emerged. This remains background noise for Romanian residents.

top_events.title: Oil prices fall and shares jump after US-Iran deal announced
top_events.summary: Continued oil price decline provides mild indirect relief on energy costs for Romanian consumers, but is an ongoing trend with no new shift.

top_events.title: Record daily jump in DRC Ebola outbreak takes death toll to 178
top_events.summary: Ebola outbreak in DRC is geographically distant from Romania with no direct travel or trade link; very low relevance to Romanian daily life.
